final_prompt.prompt:
[@skill:branding_logo:Logo & Branding]FreshBite (Healthy Food Brand)

Category: Branding + Packaging + Social Media

Overview:
FreshBite required a vibrant and fresh brand identity to reflect healthy and natural food products.

My Role:
Logo design, packaging labels, and promotional social media creatives.

Approach:
Used bright colors, simple typography, and clean layouts to communicate freshness and energy.

Outcome:
A strong and recognizable brand identity that stands out and connects well with health-conscious customers. uploaded image is logo[@image:#2:image]
